summary: Tested single-lobby enforcement feature. Backend: 9/9 tests passed for 409 conflict response, leave_conflicting param, and edge cases. Frontend: All flows verified - conflict dialog appears with correct session name, 'Stay' button dismisses without changes, 'Leave & Join This One' removes from old session and joins new one. Previous leave-if-interested fix still working (11/11 regression tests passed).

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested

critical_code_review_comments: AlertDialog missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding AlertDialogDescription component
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created dynamically during testing with unique UUIDs - no persistent seed data required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-lobby enforcement feature is fully working. Key test scenarios verified: (1) Player in_lobby in Session A gets 409 when trying to join Session B as 'joining', (2) Using leave_conflicting param removes from old session and joins new one, (3) Joining as 'interested' does NOT trigger conflict, (4) 'joining' state elsewhere does NOT trigger conflict, (5) Ended sessions do NOT trigger conflict. Frontend conflict dialog appears with correct session name and both Stay/Leave buttons work correctly.

backend: Plus 11 regression tests from previous iteration - ALL PASSED
frontend: Conflict dialog appears when in_lobby elsewhere and trying to commit to joining - PASSED
Dialog shows correct conflicting session name (e.g. 'Edge2', 'Lobby Alpha') - PASSED
Dialog has correct title 'Already In A Lobby' - PASSED
Stay button dismisses dialog without changes - PASSED
User remains in 'interested' state after clicking Stay - PASSED
Leave & Join This One removes from old session - PASSED
User transitions to 'joining' state in new session - PASSED
Toast notification 'Left the other lobby and joined this one' shown - PASSED
Normal join flow works when not in_lobby elsewhere - PASSED

features_verified.backend_409_conflict: Working - returns 409 with conflicting_session_id and conflicting_session_title
features_verified.backend_leave_conflicting: Working - removes player from conflicting session before joining new one
features_verified.backend_interested_no_conflict: Working - joining as interested does NOT trigger conflict check
features_verified.backend_joining_no_conflict: Working - being in 'joining' state elsewhere does NOT trigger conflict
